records.descriptionEn: A bilingual digital museum dedicated to the life, artworks, and visual legacy of Gu Yuan.
records.descriptionCn: 以古元生平、作品与视觉遗产为核心的双语数字美术馆。

records.descriptionEn: A research-oriented archive focused on modern Chinese visual culture and printmaking history.
records.descriptionCn: 聚焦中国现代视觉文化与版画历史的研究型档案平台。

records.descriptionEn: A digital humanities initiative combining archive systems, metadata, AI, and cultural preservation.
records.descriptionCn: 结合档案系统、metadata、AI 与文化保存的数字人文项目。

records.descriptionEn: A living archive preserving intergenerational family memory connected to Gu Yuan’s artistic legacy.
records.descriptionCn: 保存与古元艺术遗产相关跨代家族记忆的活体档案系统。

records.descriptionEn: A platform supporting international research on modern Chinese printmaking and visual history.
records.descriptionCn: 支持中国现代版画与视觉历史国际研究的平台。

records.descriptionEn: A cultural preservation project focused on safeguarding important visual heritage through digital methods.
records.descriptionCn: 通过数字化方式保存重要视觉文化遗产的文化保存项目。

records.descriptionEn: A bilingual interpretation system translating Chinese visual culture into international museum language.
records.descriptionCn: 将中国视觉文化转化为国际美术馆语言的双语翻译项目。

records.descriptionEn: A platform connecting historical archive, contemporary research, and younger generations of contributors.
records.descriptionCn: 连接历史档案、当代研究与年轻一代贡献者的平台。

records.descriptionEn: A structured museum-grade metadata and archive system for long-term cultural research.
records.descriptionCn: 用于长期文化研究的 museum-grade metadata 与档案系统。

records.descriptionEn: An AI-structured archive designed for future intelligent search, research, and preservation systems.
records.descriptionCn: 面向未来 AI 搜索、研究与保存系统建立的智能档案平台。
